title: Verified Feature PR Handoff
prompt: Read `./verified-feature-pr-handoff-verification-record.md` and `./verified-feature-pr-handoff-execution-checkpoint.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the delivery-completion decision for this verified feature branch. Preserve verification freshness, present the explicit completion outcomes clearly enough for a human to choose, identify the recommended path for this scenario, and keep downstream release handoff explicit when shipping continues.

assertions.name: four-outcomes-explicit
assertions.description: Makes the four completion outcomes visible instead of implying one vague next step

assertions.name: verification-gate-preserved
assertions.description: Keeps fresh verification evidence as a prerequisite for completion

assertions.name: recommended-path-is-pr-handoff
assertions.description: Recommends push/create PR for this scenario instead of blurring it into release management

assertions.name: discard-safety-stays-visible
assertions.description: Keeps typed discard confirmation or equivalent destructive-action safety visible

assertions.name: downstream-release-handoff-is-explicit
assertions.description: Makes the release-management handoff explicit once the PR exists
